notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.18.12
New Feature in Statistical Stretch: Save and Recall parameters so you can toggle between various settings to see how your image responds.

Syqon Axiom V3 update: standalone cli in the dropdown for starless updated for the upcoming new Starless CLI. This will break that dropdown option if you were using it with any older starless cli, but needed for use with the new version coming soon.
